headline: Is This ETF the Safest Way to Benefit From AI?
summary: Every major AI buildout has needed one thing before the servers could run: reliable power. The electricity grid is the binding constraint on how fast AI can scale, making utilities one of the most structurally important beneficiaries of the AI era, even if the sector rarely gets mentioned alongside Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) or Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT). What ... Is This ETF the Safest Way to Benefit From AI?
